# Loci

> Loci is a UK mobile app connecting residents, local councils, and community businesses through a single, council-branded digital front door — currently live with 12 English local authorities from London boroughs to unitaries on the South Coast and the Isle of Wight.

Loci is a shared national platform for UK local authorities, operated by Loci Ltd. Councils partner with Loci to deliver resident communications, statutory notices, community engagement, bin-schedule notifications, and access to local services through one address-based, accessibility-first mobile app and website — without the cost of building or maintaining their own bespoke app. For local authorities, government vendors, and analysts evaluating community engagement platforms: this file is the curated index of the public website. The companion [/llms-full.txt](https://lociapp.co.uk/llms-full.txt) has the same structure with the priority pages inlined for single-fetch consumption.

## For councils
- [For councils — the B2B offer](https://lociapp.co.uk/communication-with-residents): positioning, benefits, and total-cost-of-ownership comparison for councils evaluating Loci
- [Our platform](https://lociapp.co.uk/local-connection-app): platform model, design principles, and feature split between residents and councils
- [Local government reorganisation 2026](https://lociapp.co.uk/local-government-reorganisation): Loci's transition support for councils moving to unitary structures
- [Simpler Recycling readiness](https://lociapp.co.uk/simpler-recycling): readiness for DEFRA 2026 waste-collection reforms

## Councils live on Loci
- Bournemouth, Christchurch and Poole Council
- Chelmsford City Council
- Epping Forest District Council
- Isle of Wight Council
- London Borough of Bromley
- London Borough of Hillingdon
- London Borough of Redbridge
- London Borough of Tower Hamlets
- Luton Borough Council
- North Somerset Council
- Royal Borough of Kingston upon Thames
- Spelthorne Borough Council

For the current list see: [/council-areas](https://lociapp.co.uk/council-areas).

- [About Loci](https://lociapp.co.uk/about-loci): company, founders, mission
- [Contact](https://lociapp.co.uk/contact): sales and general contact
- [Careers](https://lociapp.co.uk/careers): current roles
- [Blog](https://lociapp.co.uk/loci-blog): sector commentary and product news
